character_buff.name: Yin And Yang
character_buff.description: Concentrates to control ones own energy and detect that of the enemy. During [Energy Pool], additional skill damage against monsters equal to extra [STR] * 8% is applied to the users clones.

effects: Duration: 600s
ATK increases according to 30% of extra [STR]
Penetration increases according to 10% of extra [STR]
Critical +15
Critical DMG +50%
Evasion + 10
Allows skills to apply [Yin and Yang] buff to caster when used

skills.name: Moonlight Illusion
skills.description: Dongye Countrys greatest shaman. Born into a family that uses shamanic arts, Seolhwa cracked all the shamanic arts passed down in Dongye Country at a young age and honed them in her own way. Knowing that she has a greater power than others, Seolhwa sets out to find Baekryong, the greatest fighter in Dongye Country, to fulfill the dream she had since childhood...

effects: Duration: 300s
Can only be used once [Omnipresence] is active
Summons 1 [Kage-no-Bunshin] (up to 4 [Kage-no-Bunshin] can be summoned)
Additional stats according to [Yin and Yang] Lv.
Additional ATK, Physical PEN, DEF and IMM based on [Caster]s total [STR]
Bonus A.R. according to [Caster]s A.R.
